en.name: International Scientific and Practical Conference 2026
en.tagline: Advancing hydrometeorological monitoring and glacier protection in the context of climate change
en.heroSubtitle: An international platform for science, policy and practical cooperation on hydrometeorology, cryosphere research, glacier preservation and climate resilience.
en.venue: Dushanbe; field visit to Rasht District
en.aboutPreview: Dedicated to 35 years of State Independence and 100 years of the Hydrometeorological Service of Tajikistan.
en.registrationHighlight: Registration and online participation details will be announced by the organizers.
